mapper.select: select d.* ,(select p.name from sys_dept p where p.dept_id = d.parent_id) as parentName from sys_dept d where d.dept_id = #{value} and d.del_flag = 0
select * from sys_dept where name = #{value} and del_flag = 0
select dept_id,parent_id,name from sys_dept where del_flag = 0

SELECT sd.*, psd.name AS parentName FROM ( SELECT dept_id from sys_dept where del_flag = 0 and path like (select '%$' || dept_id || '$%' from sys_user u where user_id = #{userId}) )a LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd on a.dept_id=sd.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept psd on sd.parent_id = psd.dept_id ORDER BY sd.order_num, sd.dept_id

SELECT sd.*, psd.name AS parentName FROM ( SELECT dept_id from sys_dept where del_flag = 0 and path like '%$1$%' )a LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd on a.dept_id=sd.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept psd on sd.parent_id = psd.dept_id ORDER BY sd.order_num, sd.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dept ( parent_id, order_num, name, contacts, business_id, path, ) values ( #{parentId}, #{orderNum}, #{name}, #{contacts}, #{businessId}, #{path} )
mapper.select: select dept_id from sys_dept where parent_id = #{value} and del_flag = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_dept where parent_id is not null and parent_id !=1 and del_flag=0;
